optionsDescription: Generate an OpenSSH key pair in this browser without uploading key material.
algorithmDescription: Ed25519 is compact and recommended for most new SSH keys. RSA remains useful for older systems.
rsaSizeDescription: Larger RSA keys are slower to generate and use. 4096 bits is a conservative default.
commentDescription: Optional. The comment is appended to the public key so you can identify it later.
outputDescription: Copy or download the OpenSSH public and private key files.
emptyDescription: Choose an algorithm, add an optional comment, then generate a key pair.
errorWebCryptoUnavailable: This browser does not expose the Web Crypto APIs required for secure key generation.
errorGenerationFailed: Key generation failed. Try a different algorithm or refresh the page.
publicKeyDescription: Add this line to authorized_keys or share it with the service that needs your SSH public key.
privateKeyDescription: Store this unencrypted private key securely. Anyone with this key can authenticate as you.
privateKeyWarningDescription: The generated private key is not encrypted with a passphrase. Move it into a secure key store and set restrictive file permissions before using it.
